title: Prometheus Rule Evaluation Missed or Skipped Evaluations
app: Prometheus 2.x with process metrics scraped or remote-written
spl:
| mstats sum(_value) AS misses WHERE index=prometheus metric_name="prometheus_rule_evaluation_misses_total" span=1h BY rule_group, job
| where misses > 0
| sort - misses
description: Missed evaluations delay alerting on critical SLO and security rules.
value: Surfaces overloaded Prometheus or slow queries blocking rule groups.
visualization: Bar chart (misses by group), Single value (total misses).
